## Checklist
- [ ] `make lint type cov` pass locally
- [ ] New/changed metrics are validated against Fairlearn in a test
- [ ] Hypothesis property tests added for new numeric invariants
- [ ] Golden audit still in band (`make audit-golden`)
- [ ] `LIMITATIONS.md` updated if the change alters what the system proves
- [ ] Conventional Commit title
